meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Clipto
products.tagline: Fully local, natural language search over terabytes of media
products.summaryZh: 完全本地化的自然语言搜索，覆盖数TB媒体内容
products.descriptionZh: 像Google Photos，但完全本地运行。将你工作中涉及的数TB视频、音频、会议和文件转化为可搜索的记忆，无需上传任何内容至云端。Clipto自动标记人物、对话和场景，只需描述你寻找的内容，即可瞬间找到埋藏在媒体中的任何时刻。速度同样出色：在MacBook Pro M5上，Clipto仅用24小时便索引了2TB的视频。
products.description: Like Google Photos, but fully local. Turn the terabytes of video, audio, meetings, and files you work with into searchable memories, without uploading anything to the cloud. Clipto automatically tags people, dialogue, and scenes, so you can instantly find any moment buried in your media just by describing what you're looking for. It's fast too: on a MacBook Pro M5, Clipto indexed 2TB of videos in just 24 hours.

products.name: Second Brain for AI
products.tagline: Persistent memory for Claude, ChatGPT & Cursor. Free.
products.summaryZh: 为Claude、ChatGPT和Cursor提供持久记忆。免费。
products.descriptionZh: 每次AI对话都从零开始。你的项目、决策和偏好，一旦关闭聊天窗口便消失无踪。Second Brain解决了这个问题。它是一个自托管的记忆层，兼容Claude、ChatGPT、Cursor以及任何MCP客户端。你可以一次性存储上下文，并通过语义而非关键词来回忆。它包含重复检测、语义搜索和网页界面。基于Cloudflare构建，提供免费层级，你的数据始终属于你。采用MIT许可证。
products.description: Every AI conversation starts from zero. Your projects, decisions, and preferences disappear as soon as you close the chat. Second Brain fixes that. It is a self-hosted memory layer that works with Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and any MCP client. You can store context once and recall it by meaning instead of keywords. It includes duplicate detection, semantic search, and a web UI. Built on Cloudflare, it offers a free tier and your data remains yours. MIT licensed.

products.name: TabTasker
products.tagline: Zero servers. Total privacy. Your new favorite toolbox.
products.summaryZh: 零服务器。完全隐私。你的新最爱工具箱。
products.descriptionZh: 一款完全离线运行于浏览器的免费网页工具箱。我们打造了TabTasker，让您无需上传任何文件即可编辑PDF、处理图片、转录音频，并畅享50余种实用工具。最后，它完全免费使用。
products.description: A free web toolbox running 100% offline in your browser. We built TabTasker so you can edit PDFs, process images, transcribe audio, and access 50+ utilities without uploading a single file. Lastly, it is free to use.

products.name: Marqly 5.0
products.tagline: Your AI-powered bookmark manager
products.summaryZh: 你的AI驱动书签管理器
products.descriptionZh: Marqly 是一款基于人工智能的书签管理工具，通过智能标签、分类和语义搜索，自动整理您保存的链接。您可以从任何设备保存文章、视频、文档和网站，然后使用自然语言而非文件夹和手动分类，即时找到所需内容。借助 AI 摘要、阅读模式、跨平台同步、离线访问和智能整理功能，Marqly 帮助您构建一个无需维护即可搜索的知识库。
products.description: Marqly is an AI-powered bookmark manager that automatically organizes your saved links using intelligent tagging, categorization, and semantic search. Save articles, videos, docs, and websites from any device, then find them instantly using natural language instead of folders and manual sorting. With AI summaries, reader mode, cross-platform sync, offline access, and smart organization, Marqly helps you build a searchable knowledge library without the maintenance.

products.name: Web Clipper for NotebookLM
products.tagline: Your ultimate NotebookLM's Chrome Extension
products.summaryZh: 你的终极NotebookLM Chrome扩展
products.descriptionZh:
NotebookLM，两端同步增强。  
• 一键收录：点击即可保存任意网页、PDF、AI对话、Reddit帖子、推文，或YouTube视频、频道、播放列表（可精选需包含的视频）。  
• 导出输出：NotebookLM的闪卡导出至Anki，思维导图导出至Obsidian，报告导出至Word/PDF，完整对话导出至Markdown。  
• 同步无忧：Google Drive来源文件在后台自动刷新。  
• 界面融入：如同Google原生打造。
products.description: NotebookLM, supercharged from both ends. • Clip in: one click saves any web page, PDF, AI chat, Reddit thread, tweet or a YouTube video, channel, or playlist (cherry-pick which videos to include). • Export out: NotebookLM's flashcards to Anki, mind maps to Obsidian, reports to Word/PDF, full chats to Markdown. • Stay in sync: Google Drive sources auto-refresh in the background. • UI blends in like Google built it.

products.name: Copycat Cafe
products.tagline: Learn your next language by copying native speakers
products.summaryZh: 通过模仿母语者学习你的下一门语言
products.descriptionZh: 大多数语言应用只教你认单词。Copycat Cafe 教你开口说。观看由母语者声音克隆的真实对话，模仿他们的发音，AI 会为你的发音打分（0-100%），然后自由与 AI 对话，它会无评判地纠正你。每天15分钟。目前支持法语和西班牙语，更多语言即将推出。由两位会阅读每一封邮件的开发者打造。已有1000+付费学习者，月经常性收入1.6万美元。
products.description: Most language apps teach you to recognize words. Copycat Cafe teaches you to speak them. Watch real conversations with voices cloned from native speakers, copy what they say with AI scoring your pronunciation 0-100%, then chat freely with an AI that corrects you without judgment. 15 minutes a day. French and Spanish, more languages coming. Built by two people who read every email. 1,000+ paying learners, $16k MRR.

products.name: Zoomix
products.tagline: Create beautiful product demos with smooth zoom effects.
products.summaryZh: 创建精美的产品演示，并带有流畅的缩放效果。
products.descriptionZh: 大多数录屏看起来廉价又杂乱。观众流失，创作者浪费数小时剪辑。Zoomix 直接从浏览器录制，并自动添加智能缩放效果、光标追踪和干净背景，让你的录屏变得惊艳。无需剪辑，无需插件。只需点击录制，分享值得一看的内容。
products.description: Most screen recordings look cheap and messy. Viewers drop off. Creators waste hours editing. Zoomix records straight from your browser and automatically adds smart zoom effects, cursor tracking, and clean backgrounds to make your recordings magical. No editing. No plugins. Just hit record and share something worth watching.

products.name: DROP
products.tagline: Turn creative files into beautiful client delivery pages.
products.summaryZh: 将创意文件转化为精美的客户交付页面。
products.descriptionZh: 我们移除了95%的冗余功能，包括几乎所有“AI”功能，让DROP回归纯粹与简洁。
products.description: We removed 95% bullshit features, include almost all "AI " features, make DROP pure and simple again

products.name: Uindow
products.tagline: The programmable browser with trusted interactions
products.summaryZh: 可编程浏览器，支持可信交互
products.descriptionZh: Uindow 是一款可编程浏览器，专为真实世界的网页自动化而设计。借助世界一流的录制器，您可以轻松创建自动化流程，并可使用纯 JavaScript 进行编辑。
products.description: Uindow is a programmable browser for real-world web automation. Create automations with ease, with a world-class recorder, and can edit them in pure JavaScript.

products.name: Harness Starter Kit
products.tagline: Repo guardrails for reliable AI coding agents
products.summaryZh: AI编码代理的仓库护栏
products.descriptionZh: Harness Starter Kit帮助团队将脆弱的AI编码提示转化为持久的仓库规则：AGENTS.md、漂移检查、故障记忆、采用报告以及用于更安全智能体协作的堆栈配置文件。
products.description: Harness Starter Kit helps teams turn fragile AI coding prompts into durable repository rules: AGENTS.md, drift checks, failure memory, adoption reports, and stack profiles for safer agent collaboration.

products.name: Hum
products.tagline: Make your website feel alive with realtime visitor presence
products.summaryZh: 让您的网站因实时访客动态而充满活力
products.descriptionZh: 大多数访客计数器和社交证明插件显得过时、突兀，或过度侧重数据分析。Hum 优先考虑现代设计，提供美观的实时访客徽章、在线状态组件，以及 20 多种可自定义模板，能自然融入现代网站。开发者可通过简单集成添加这些功能，企业则能获得轻量级数据分析和自定义选项，无需传统分析平台的复杂性。
products.description: Most visitor counters and social proof widgets look outdated, intrusive, or overly focused on analytics. Hum focuses on modern design first, offering beautiful realtime visitor badges, live presence widgets, and 20+ customisable templates that blend naturally into modern websites. Developers can add them with a simple integration, while businesses get lightweight analytics and customisation without the complexity of traditional analytics platforms.

products.name: ColorCraft
products.tagline: Batch-recolor 500+ sprites in seconds
products.summaryZh: 数秒内批量重新着色500多个精灵图
products.descriptionZh: 创建角色、元素变体和生态主题资源通常需要大量手动操作。ColorCraft 是一款专业的批量重着色引擎，能自动完成游戏开发中的“枯燥环节”。只需链接你的 aseprite 文件、选择调色板，即可在绘制时实时查看变体更新。凭借原生 Aseprite Live-Link、4 种感知色彩匹配算法以及工业级批量处理能力（500+ 精灵图秒级完成），ColorCraft 正是你像素艺术工作流中缺失的关键环节。
products.description: Creating characters, elemental variants, and biome-themed assets usually takes a lot of manual work. ColorCraft is a professional batch-recoloring engine that automates the "boring part" of gamedev. Simply link youraseprite files, pick your palettes, and watch your variations update in real-time as you draw. With native Aseprite Live-Link, 4 perceptual color matching algorithms, and industrial-scale batching (500+ sprites in seconds), ColorCraft is the missing link in your pixel art pipeline.

products.name: CoffeePomodoro
products.tagline: Brew your productivity, one Pomodoro at a time
products.summaryZh: 一次一个番茄钟，冲泡你的生产力。
products.descriptionZh: CoffeePomodoro 将专注时段转化为温暖的咖啡之旅。采用经典番茄工作法，从 Babyccino 到 Coffee Conqueror 逐步晋升咖啡等级，追踪连续记录，并通过温馨动画、21种专注音效、Dynamic Island 支持及桌面小组件保持动力。由独立开发者历时1.5年每日构建。适用于 iOS 与 Android。
products.description: CoffeePomodoro turns your focus sessions into a warm coffee journey. Use the classic Pomodoro technique, level up through coffee ranks (from Babyccino to Coffee Conqueror), track streaks, and stay motivated with cozy animations, 21 focus sounds, Dynamic Island support, and home screen widgets. Built daily for 1.5 years by a solo indie dev. Available on iOS & Android.

products.name: CollectMonial
products.tagline: Custom testimonial walls that match your brand and convert
products.summaryZh: 自定义客户评价墙，贴合品牌形象，提升转化效果。
products.descriptionZh: CollectMonial 是一款专为SaaS创始人和独立创业者设计的推荐语收集软件。向客户发送单一链接，他们即可录制视频或撰写推荐语，你只需一个脚本标签，就能在网站上嵌入完全品牌化的推荐语墙。可自定义卡片边缘、颜色和布局，以匹配你的品牌风格。
products.description: CollectMonial is testimonial collection software for SaaS founders and solopreneurs. Send a single link to clients, they record a video or write a testimonial, and you embed a fully branded testimonial wall on your site with one script tag. Customize card edges, colors, and layouts to match your brand.

products.name: AnyFrame
products.tagline: Platform for every agent your team builds
products.summaryZh: 适用于团队构建的每一个智能体的平台
products.descriptionZh: 数分钟内即可启动任意用例、任意框架下的智能体集群，适用于内部工具或面向客户的产品。
products.description: Spin up swarms of agents in minutes, for any use case, on any harness. For internal tools or customer-facing products.

products.name: JSON Kit
products.tagline: Fix broken AI JSON and 6 more JSON tools, all in-browser
products.summaryZh: 修复损坏的AI JSON及其他6个JSON工具，全部在浏览器内运行
products.descriptionZh: JSON Kit 是一套为AI时代打造的快速浏览器端JSON工具。其核心功能是修复大语言模型JSON：粘贴ChatGPT、Claude或本地模型给出的损坏JSON，即可立即获得干净有效的JSON，并附带具体错误标签（如尾随逗号、单引号、Python字面量、Markdown代码块、截断输出等）。所有操作100%在浏览器中完成，你的输出不会触及任何服务器。
products.description: JSON Kit is a set of fast, browser-side JSON tools built for the AI era. The standout is Fix LLM JSON: paste the broken JSON that ChatGPT, Claude, or local models hand you, and get clean, valid JSON back instantly, with a label for exactly what was wrong (trailing commas, single quotes, Python literals, markdown fences, truncated output, and more). Everything runs 100% in your browser, so your output never touches a server.

products.name: PogKit
products.tagline: In-browser toolkit for makers, and everyday utilities
products.summaryZh: 面向创作者的浏览器内工具包，以及日常实用工具
products.descriptionZh: PogKit 是一个注重隐私的浏览器工具集，包含 70 多种基于浏览器的工具、游戏和实用程序。它涵盖开发者工具、文件转换器、图像工具、文本工具、生成器、计算器和游戏分析工具，大多数处理在浏览器本地完成。
products.description: PogKit is a privacy-friendly collection of 70+ browser-based tools, games, and utilities. It includes developer tools, file converters, image utilities, text tools, generators, calculators, and game analysis tools, with most processing handled locally in the browser.

products.name: Oura Ring 5
products.tagline: The world’s smallest smart ring, now even better
products.summaryZh: 全球最小智能戒指，现已全面升级
products.descriptionZh: Oura Ring 5 现已登场。钛金属设计，体积缩小40%，续航长达9天，支持睡眠、活动、压力、心脏健康与恢复监测。
products.description: Meet Oura Ring 5. Now 40% smaller with a titanium design and up to 9 days of battery for sleep, activity, stress, heart health, and recovery.

products.name: Mixstream
products.tagline: Rebuilding Music and Digital Economy
products.summaryZh: 重塑音乐与数字经济
products.descriptionZh: Mixstream让艺术家掌控自己的音乐经济，透明且公平。发布并分发至所有数字服务提供商，通过同步授权实现曲库变现，精确查看每笔版税如何产生，精确到单次播放。没有黑箱会计，没有中间商抽成；只有透明的报酬、公平的分成，以及100%的母带所有权。
products.description: Mixstream puts artists in control of their own music economy, transparently and fairly. Release and distribute to every DSP, monetize your catalog through sync licensing, and see exactly how every royalty is generated, down to the stream. No black-box accounting, no middlemen skimming the top; just transparent payouts, fair splits, and 100% ownership of our masters.

products.name: Skipper Study
products.tagline: Day Skipper theory practice, one round at a time
products.summaryZh: Day Skipper 理论实践，一次一回合
products.descriptionZh: Skipper Study 通过简短、聚焦的测验环节，帮助新船长练习日间船长理论。选择浮标、灯光、潮汐、海图作业、VHF 和引航等模块，然后查看每个答案，附有简明英语解释和来源参考。
products.description: Skipper Study helps new skippers practise Day Skipper theory with short, focused quiz rounds. Choose modules like buoyage, lights, tides, chartwork, VHF, and pilotage, then review every answer with plain-English explanations and source references.
